how-i-think.title: How I think about systems engineering
how-i-think.subtitle: My approach doesn't start with tools, but with understanding the big picture.
about-this-web.title: This web is also a project
about-this-web.subtitle: Designed, developed and maintained as an engineering project: clear structure, version control and continuous deployment.
about-this-web.description: This web is built from scratch as an engineering project, not as a template. It serves me to practice small-scale system design: component architecture, change control, automation and real deployment.
about-this-web.bullet1: Component architecture and coherent design system (typography, spacing, color tokens)
about-this-web.bullet2: Version control and professional workflow (Git, branches, traceable changes)
about-this-web.bullet3: Automated build and deployment as part of the project lifecycle

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Technical support for events, audiovisual production, and AV systems where sound, network, and infrastructure need to work together.

soundEngineering.title: Sound Engineering
soundEngineering.description: Mixing and technical sound support for live events, concerts, and audiovisual production.

soundSystemEngineering.title: Sound System Engineering
soundSystemEngineering.description: Verification, measurement, and optimization of sound systems to improve coverage, coherence, and reliability.

avNetworking.title: AV Networking
avNetworking.description: Design, deployment, and troubleshooting of IP networks for audio, video, control, streaming, and technical production.

technicalPlanning.title: Technical Planning
technicalPlanning.description: Planning, documentation, and technical coordination to reduce improvisation before and during the event.

hybrid-profile.title: A hybrid technical profile
hybrid-profile.subtitle: Field experience, sound criteria and infrastructure mindset.
hybrid-profile.text1: I come from the field: live sound, audiovisual production, signal flow, troubleshooting and technical coordination.
hybrid-profile.text2: Over time, that experience has connected with IP networking, AV systems, automation, documentation and infrastructure.
hybrid-profile.text3: My approach is to understand the event as a complete technical system: sound, network, signal flow, people, documentation and operation working in the same direction.
hybrid-profile.bullet1: Real-world experience in events, sound and audiovisual production.
hybrid-profile.bullet3: Ability to document, diagnose and improve real technical environments.

panel.title: The event as a complete technical system
panel.text: Sound, network, signal flow, people, documentation and operation are part of the same workflow. When one part fails, the whole system feels it.

featuredCaseStudies.title: Featured case studies
featuredCaseStudies.subtitle: Projects and experiences connecting sound, networks, software and infrastructure in real environments.

technicalPlanningEvents.title: Technical planning for events
technicalPlanningEvents.description: Technical requirements review, provider coordination, documentation and risk analysis for events and audiovisual production.
technicalPlanningEvents.value: Shows real technical production experience and the ability to structure projects before deployment.

networkScout.title: Portable network diagnostics
networkScout.description: Network diagnostics and reporting tool designed for unmanaged technical environments, field testing and troubleshooting.
networkScout.value: Connects networking, Linux, automation and real field needs into a practical tool.

personalWebsiteInfrastructure.title: Self-hosted personal website infrastructure
personalWebsiteInfrastructure.description: React frontend, backend services, Docker, NGINX, CI/CD and self-hosted deployment as a real portfolio platform.
personalWebsiteInfrastructure.value: Shows the ability to build, deploy and maintain self-hosted production systems.

CTA.h2: Need technical support for an event, venue or production system?
CTA.p: Tell me what you are preparing, deploying or trying to solve. I can help with sound, AV networking, technical planning and infrastructure.
